summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The COtwo Advisors Physical European Carbon Allowance Trust ETF of Beneficial Interest (CTWO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in carbon credits commodities. The fund is a trust that provides exposure to the price of EU carbon allowances (EUAs). It holds physical EUAs in the EU registry, allowing investors to track carobon prices via shares, minus fees and expenses. CTWO was launched on Jun 17, 2025 and is issued by COtwo.
infoTable: EU Carbon Emission Allowances - Benchmark Price Return
